widget.convert: {"template": [ MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (13, 3), size = (46, 46), png = 0), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (80, 13), size = (100, 23), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 1, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (213, 13), size = (100, 23), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 2, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (346, 13), size = (266, 23), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 3, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (646, 13), size = (120, 23), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 4, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (800, 13), size = (20, 20), png = 5), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (833, 13), size = (133, 23), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 6, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), ], "fonts": [gFont("Regular", 18)], "itemHeight": 53 }
